_about: Per-field provenance for non-derived fields in data/projects/pearl.json and key claims in allocations/pearl/genesis.json. Derived fields (pct_mined, emission_remaining, daily_emission, annual_inflation_pct, fdmc, circulating_mcap, token_velocity) are computed by scripts/compute_derived.py and intentionally omitted here.

ticker.notes: Ticker 'PRL' shown in explorer transaction values.

algorithm.notes: PoUW: matrix multiplication on GPU. Bitcoin-protocol fork. Foundational paper by Komargodski & Weinstein.

launch_date.notes: 2026-04-27 corroborated across alphamine.tech, spheron.network, lordofpearls.xyz, and whitepaper text. Year was initially inferred from context; multi-source confirmation upgraded to high.

launch_type.notes: Reclassified from 'fair' to 'fair_with_suspicion' on 2026-05-30 after observing wallet-rotation pattern on prlscan.com (4 wallets all first-active at 2026-04-27 04:00, each mined 73-91 blocks then went silent, 3 of 4 with zero outbound transfers) and wealth-concentration metrics on pearlchain.live/analytics (Gini 0.922, top 1% holds 55.6%). See allocations/pearl/genesis.json for full evidence.

has_premine.notes: On-chain verified — block 0 has standard miner-only coinbase output, no premine allocation.

supply.max_supply.notes: Whitepaper: S = 2,100,000,000 PRL; grain = 1e-8 PRL. Corroborated by blockspot.io and coinpaprika.

supply.current_supply.notes: Estimated from whitepaper's closed-form cumulative emission curve cumulative(t)=S*t/(t+H) at observed block height ~64,528. No explicit supply endpoint on explorer; aggregators show 'no data'.

emission.current_block_reward.notes: WhatToMine 2,672.84 at block 64,527; Hashrate.no 2,673; matches whitepaper formula E*(t)=S*H/((t+H)(t+H-1)).

emission.block_time_seconds.notes: Reporting whitepaper target of 194s. Live observations are 114-119s (Hashrate.no, WhatToMine) and since-launch average is ~44s (64,528 blocks / 33 days). Both are transient difficulty-ramp artifacts; using observed values produces incoherent emission projections (2.1B cap exhausted in 3 years at 119s).

emission.halving_schedule.notes: Polynomial decay ~1/t^2; no discrete halvings exist by design. Schedule entries are COMPUTED waypoints from whitepaper formula E*(t) = S*H/((t+H)(t+H-1)), not protocol events.

market_data.current_price_usd.notes: Single-exchange listing; aggregators not yet populated. Intraday range $0.79-$1.57 on 2026-05-30. Community OTC reported at ~$0.36.

market_data.daily_volume.notes: SafeTrade 24h volume; corroborated by hashrate.no aggregator ($1.27M earlier in day).

genesis.blockchain_data_complete.notes: Explorer serves block 0 and all sampled historical heights (0, 1, 2, 100, 500, 1000, 5000, 10000, 64500). No Kaspa-style gap.

genesis.dev_tax.notes: On-chain verified: coinbase tx has single output paying full subsidy to one miner. No protocol-level dev cut. Caveat: official Pearl Research pool charges 20% off-protocol fee.

genesis.suspected_insider_mining.wealth_.notes: Gini 0.922, top 1% holds 55.6%, top 10% holds 88.6%, 42,872 holders, median 16.71 PRL. Observed on 2026-05-30, snapshot in time.

genesis.suspected_insider_mining.wallet_.notes: Four observed coinbase addresses, all first-active 2026-04-27 04:00 (launch), each mining 73-91 blocks then silent, 3/4 with zero outbound transfers. Address list: prl1p2atxm.../prl1p2wp3hv.../prl1pav6jt.../prl1p334dkk... Combined 326 blocks, ~1.025M PRL. Pattern is the classic insider-rotation fingerprint.

genesis.pool_concentration.notes: Current-state mining pool dominance on 2026-05-30: PearlHash ~65% (9.61 EH/s, 216 blocks/24h), AlphaMine ~34% (4.96 EH/s, 170 blocks/24h). Two pools control ~99% of present-day hashrate.

genesis.hardware_gating.notes: Reference miner restricted to NVIDIA H100/H200 datacenter GPUs (sm90). Corroborated by spheron.network setup guide and pearlhash.xyz.

team.omri_weinstein.notes: Named as Co-founder & CEO. Background: PhD Princeton, Asst Prof Columbia/Hebrew U, prior roles at Nvidia and Vast Data per X bio.

team.ilan_komargodski.notes: Co-author of foundational Pearl PoUW paper. Role within Pearl Research Labs (co-founder vs academic collaborator) not publicly disclosed.
